name: Pineapple Vegetarian Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, heat the oil over medium heat and stir-fry the onion and garlic until golden brown.
2. Add the carrots and green beans and stir-fry for 2 minutes longer.
3. Add the pineapple, rice, ketchup, and salt. Mix well and stir-fry for another 3 minutes.
4. Arrange the cucumber around the serving platter.
5. Pour the rice into the center.
6. Garnish with chopped green onions and fresh cilantro leaves.
